context: Glass Animals' 'Heat Waves' completed an unprecedented slow-burn climb that took over two years from release to year-end #1, exemplifying TikTok's power to revive catalog tracks. Harry Styles dominated with two top-ten entries from Harry's House, Adele's 'Easy On Me' carried over from a blockbuster late-2021 album cycle, and Steve Lacy's 'Bad Habit' showed that lo-fi bedroom pop could scale to mainstream success.
